2606.19501.title: DeXposure-Claw: An Agentic System for DeFi Risk Supervision
2606.19501.paper_summary: Decentralized finance exposes supervisors to fast-moving, networked credit risks. General-purpose LLM agents fit this setting poorly: they over-read weak evidence and recommend high-stakes interventions, while existing evaluations offer no regulator-aligned way to measure the resulting false alarms. We introduce DeXposure-Claw, a forecast-grounded agentic supervision system that routes LLM decisions through structured evidence: (1) DeXposure-FM, a graph time-series foundation model, forecasts future exposure networks; (2) deterministic monitors and stress scenarios then turn those forecasts into typed alerts, attribution signals, and scenario evidence; and (3) data-health and confidence gates constrain escalation before DeXposure-Claw emits auditable supervisory tickets with rationales. We further develop DeXposure-Bench, a six-axis evaluation harness, whose decision axis scores tickets against a regulator-aligned absolute-loss ground truth and an explicit false-intervention rate. Experiments on five years of weekly real data fully support our system. Code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/DeXposure-Claw.
2606.19501.paper_summary_zh: 去中心化金融使監管機構面臨快速變化的網絡信用風險。通用型大型語言模型代理不適合這種情境：它們過度解讀微弱的證據並建議高風險的干預，而現有的評估則沒有提供與監管機構對齊的方式來衡量由此產生的虛假警報。我們介紹了DeXposure-Claw，一個基於預測的代理監管系統，通過結構化證據來引導大型語言模型的決策：(1) DeXposure-FM，一個圖形時間序列基礎模型，預測未來的風險暴露網絡；(2) 確定性監控器和壓力情景將這些預測轉化為類型警報、歸因信號和情景證據；(3) 數據健康和信心閘限制升級，然後DeXposure-Claw發出帶有理由的可審計監管票據。我們進一步開發了DeXposure-Bench，一個六軸評估工具，其決策軸根據與監管機構對齊的絕對損失真實值和明確的虛假干預率對票據進行評分。對五年每週真實數據的實驗充分支持我們的系統。代碼位於 https://github.com/EVIEHub/DeXposure-Claw。
2606.19501.author: Aijie Shu et.al.
2606.19501.authors: Aijie Shu, Bowei Chen, Wenbin Wu, Cathy Yi-Hsuan Chen, Fengxiang He
